ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to (e.g., Division I, Division II) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team (city, state) */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "colors" TEXT /* Colors of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team */,
  "record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the team */,
  "barthag" REAL /* BARTHAG (a measure of team strength) of the team */,
  "adj_o" REAL /* Adjusted offense metric of the team */,
  "adj_o_rk" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's adjusted offense */,
  "adj_d" REAL /* Adjusted defense metric of the team */,
  "adj_d_rk" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's adjusted defense */,
  "adj_tempo" REAL /* Adjusted tempo (pace of play) of the team */,
  "adj_tempo_rk" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's adjusted tempo */,
  "strength_of_schedule" REAL /* Strength of the team's schedule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_results" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "score" TEXT /* Score of the game */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the game (win/loss) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_results_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "opponents" (
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each opponent */,
  "opponent_name" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the opponent belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the opponent belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the opponent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("opponent_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projected_records" (
  "proj_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each projection */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "proj_record" TEXT /* Projected win-loss record of the team */,
  "proj_conf_record" TEXT /* Projected conference win-loss record of the team */,
  "proj_rank" INTEGER /* Projected ranking of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("proj_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_projected_records_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "advanced_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "wab" REAL /* WAB (a measure of team strength) of the team */,
  "wab_rk" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's WAB */,
  "barthag" REAL /* BARTHAG (a measure of team strength) of the team */,
  "barthag_rk" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team's BARTHAG */,
  "four_factors" TEXT /* Four factors of the team's performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_advanced_statistics_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, coach, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the team data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "data_accessed" TEXT /* Specific data accessed by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_rosters" (
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roster entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player (in pounds) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the player is in */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roster_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_rosters_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roster entry */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Points per game scored by the player */,
  "rebounds_per_game" REAL /* Rebounds per game grabbed by the player */,
  "assists_per_game" REAL /* Assists per game made by the player */,
  "steals_per_game" REAL /* Steals per game made by the player */,
  "blocks_per_game" REAL /* Blocks per game made by the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_roster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roster_id") REFERENCES team_rosters ("roster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the coach */,
  "win_loss_record" TEXT /* Win-loss record of the coach */,
  "awards" TEXT /* Awards won by the coach */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "arenas" (
  "arena_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each arena */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the arena */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the arena */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the arena */,
  "year_opened" INTEGER /* Year the arena was opened */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("arena_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_arenas_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "opponent_id" INTEGER /* ID of the opponent */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "broadcast" TEXT /* Broadcast information for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_opponent_id FOREIGN KEY ("opponent_id") REFERENCES opponents ("opponent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruits" (
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruit */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "recruit_name" TEXT /* Name of the recruit */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the recruit */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the recruit (in inches) */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the recruit (in pounds) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the recruit will enter */,
  "hometown" TEXT /* Hometown of the recruit */,
  "high_school" TEXT /* High school of the recruit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruits_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rankings" (
  "ranking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ranking */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Ranking of the team */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the ranking was published */,
  "poll" TEXT /* Poll the ranking is from (e.g., AP, Coaches) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ranking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rankings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the award winner */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the award was won */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., Player of the Year, Coach of the Year) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roster entry */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the injury (e.g., out, day-to-day) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_roster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roster_id") REFERENCES team_rosters ("roster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transfers" (
  "transfer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transfer */,
  "roster_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roster entry */,
  "transfer_date" TEXT /* Date the transfer occurred */,
  "destination" TEXT /* Destination of the transfer (e.g., another team, the NBA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transfer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transfers_roster_id FOREIGN KEY ("roster_id") REFERENCES team_rosters ("roster_id")
)
